admin_required: 🛡️ Bot requires the 'Invite via Link' permission to work!

gcast_usage: Reply to a message to broadcast across the network.

gcast_end: ✅ Global message delivered to {0} groups and {1} users.
help_menu: 🌌 Shawon - Galactic Master HUB 🌌 Welcome to the supreme streaming sanctuary! I am the most powerful, highly-tailored music engine in existence. 🎙️💎✨ 👑 Commander: @ShawonXnone 📢 Strategic Hub: @Shawon_28 Click the modules below to explore my advanced command matrix! 👇
help_admins: 🛡️ ADMIN COMMANDS /pause - Pause current stream. /resume - Resume stream. /skip - Play next track. /stop - Kill the session. /seek [sec] - Move forward. /seekback [sec] - Move backward. /reload - Refresh admin cache.
help_auth: 🔑 AUTHENTICATION /auth - Grant stream access to a user. /unauth - Revoke stream access.
help_lang: 🌐 LANGUAGE SETTINGS /lang - Choose your preferred language.
help_ping: 📡 SYSTEM CHECKS /ping - Check latency & server health. /stats - View bot statistics.
help_play: 🎶 PLAYBACK COMMANDS /play [song] - Stream high-quality audio. /vplay [video] - Stream HD video. -f : Force start. -v : Video stream.
help_stats: 📊 BOT ANALYTICS /stats - Detailed bot performance metrics.
help_sudo: 👑 OWNER COMMANDS /broadcast - Global announcement. /restart - Server reboot. /addsudo - Add helper admin.
ping_pong: 💎 SYSTEM STATUS 📡 Latency: {0}ms 📈 Uptime: {1} 🦾 CPU: {2}% 🧠 RAM: {3}% 💽 Disk: {4}%
play_admin: 🛡️ RESTRICTED: Only admins can play music in this chat.
play_banned: 🚫 BANNED: This chat is restricted from music streaming.
play_queued: ✅ | ADDED TO QUEUE 📌 Title: {2} ⏳ Duration: {3} min 👤 Requested by: {4}
play_seek_min: ⚠️ Seek time must be 10s or more.
play_queue_full: ⚠️ Queue is full ({0}). Wait for tracks to finish.
play_user_invalid: ⚠️ Switch from Anonymous Admin to use this.
start_pm: 🔥 Shawon - THE ULTIMATE STREAMER 🔥 Experience high-definition, buffer-free music and video streaming like never before! 🎙️💎✨ 👑 High Command: @ShawonXnone 📢 Global Updates: @Shawon_28 Press the buttons below to engage the Core Intelligence! 👇
start_gp: 🔥 Shawon 🔥 Powering your group with non-stop Galactic Quality Streams! 🎙️💎✨
